propagation_equation_v2.route_term: R_prop_scale = mean(1 - R_route_mega, G_route, T_route, 1 - R_collapse_mega)
propagation_equation_v2.system_term: M_prop_scale = S_prop_scale + C_prop_scale + R_prop_scale + L_prop_scale + R_scale - P_scale
